note: Index of the per-collection navigation files, each an RWPM subset (Readium Web Publication Manifest: metadata + links + readingOrder + toc). This index itself is not RWPM (RWPM has no list-of-publications concept). Consumed by fulltoc.html (which collections to render, in order) and booknav.js (map a page path -> its collection via `prefixes`; longest match wins; `fallback` catches unmatched /zf_info pages). Hand-maintained.
